ddls:
CREATE TABLE "maps" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the map */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the map */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Map provider (e.g., Google Maps, OpenStreetMap) */,
  "center_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the map center */,
  "center_lng" REAL /* Longitude of the map center */,
  "zoom_level" INTEGER /* Default zoom level of the map */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the map configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the map configuration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the map is active or not */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maps_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "map_options" (
  "option_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each map option */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map the option belongs to */,
  "option_name" TEXT /* Name of the option (e.g., minifyJS, noClear) */,
  "option_value" TEXT /* Value of the option (e.g., TRUE, FALSE) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the map option was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the map option */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the option is a default setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("option_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_options_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map the event belongs to */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., onclick, ondblclick) */,
  "event_handler" TEXT /* JavaScript code to handle the event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the event handler was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the event handler */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the event handler is active or not */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "layers" (
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each layer */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map the layer belongs to */,
  "layer_name" TEXT /* Name of the layer */,
  "layer_type" TEXT /* Type of the layer (e.g., tile, overlay) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the layer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the layer */,
  "is_visible" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the layer is visible by default */,
  "layer_order" INTEGER /* Order in which layers are displayed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("layer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_layers_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markers" (
  "marker_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marker */,
  "layer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the layer the marker belongs to */,
  "marker_name" TEXT /* Name of the marker */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the marker */,
  "lng" REAL /* Longitude of the marker */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the marker was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the marker */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the marker is active or not */,
  "marker_icon" TEXT /* Icon or image used for the marker */,
  "marker_description" TEXT /* Description of the marker */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("marker_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_markers_layer_id FOREIGN KEY ("layer_id") REFERENCES layers ("layer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active or not */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login time of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "map_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the map */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the map was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Exact time when the map was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the map */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_access_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "map_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map the metadata belongs to */,
  "metadata_key" TEXT /* Key of the metadata (e.g., center, zoom) */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the metadata entry */,
  "metadata_description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_map_metadata_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "map_id" INTEGER /* ID of the map the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission (e.g., read, write) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the permission */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the permission is active or not */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_map_id FOREIGN KEY ("map_id") REFERENCES maps ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
